description: Identify which labeled same-texture tile owns the visible surface under a red crosshair in an occluded raster scene.

row_fields.image: relative solver_bundle path to a PPM image

jsonl_rows.answer: one of A, B, C, D
one of A, B, C, D

auditing.rationale: A human can visually trace exposed piece fragments, follow occlusion boundaries, and verify that only badge labels reveal identity.

difficulty_rationale: Piece bodies are visually identical away from badges.
The target piece is frequently fragmented into disconnected visible islands.
Local crops around the crosshair are intentionally non-diagnostic.
Shortcut heuristics like nearest badge or largest visible component are often wrong.
